prompt: Create a photorealistic fashion/lifestyle collage showing the same athletic young woman in an urban outdoor stairway setting, with her face intentionally anonymized by flat rectangular blur blocks. The collage contains exactly 5 discrete photo panels: 1 large central full-body vertical shot of the woman standing sideways on concrete stairs under a blue sky with clouds, 1 top-left full-body walking shot on a concrete ramp while carrying a black backpack, 1 bottom-left close-up selfie-like cropped shot with an arm reaching toward the camera, 1 top-right rear-view shot showing her hair bun and the back of her shirt near a modern glass building, and 1 bottom-right side-view leaning/resting pose by a metal railing with greenery and pedestrians in the background. The subject wears a bright royal blue fitted cropped T-shirt with black trim, black jogger pants, white sneakers, and blonde hair tied in a neat low bun; include a black backpack only in the top-left panel. Use a wide horizontal canvas, approximately 16:9, with overlapping rectangular image panels and soft collage blending at the edges. Lighting should be natural midday sunlight, high-resolution camera realism, shallow-to-moderate depth of field, crisp clothing texture, concrete stairs, metal railings, glass-and-steel architecture, blue sky, and urban campus atmosphere. Add no captions, no logos, no watermark, and no extra people as primary subjects; background pedestrians may appear only small and out of focus. Keep the face anonymization visible as simple opaque blurred rectangles in every panel where the face appears.
